prompts: Warm Japanese fantasy guild infirmary mood, an androgynous frontline adventurer in a short guild cloak and reinforced leather armor with an androgynous scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps; the frontline adventurer carefully supports the scout by the shoulder after a tiring quest drill, gentle two-person movement, clear hands and posture, soft lantern light, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous guild shot; after ten seconds the scout regains balance and nods while the frontline adventurer keeps a steady supportive hold, soft lantern light, calm cooperative motion, consistent character appearance and background, no text, no watermark.
